title: gahnia lanigera var. aristata
intro: Gahnia lanigera var. aristata, also known as the 'Woolly Saw-sedge', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The Woolly Saw-sedge can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual use.
